items.title: AI-Assisted Discovery Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve broad-intent shopping conversion through search refinement, grounded product comparison, and higher-confidence discovery.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of shopping sessions that reach a relevant decision surface quickly.
Increase repeat orders by reducing discovery effort and uncertainty.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reinforce the perception that Amazon is the easiest place to start shopping.

productBricks.change: Improve broad-intent ranking and category refinement.
Improve comparison logic and grounding quality.
Improve product decision surfaces with clearer tradeoff presentation.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated discovery and assistant treatments to iOS.
Release updated discovery and assistant treatments to Android.

items.title: Prime Promise Reliability Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve delivery promise precision, order-state clarity, and low-cost issue resolution.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase delivery reliability against shopper expectations.
Reduce effort when orders need intervention.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase Prime renewal confidence through stronger convenience.

productBricks.change: Improve promise precision and delay warning logic.
Improve order-state visibility and exception explanations.
Improve self-service return and refund resolution.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved post-purchase experiences on web.

items.title: Seller Buyability and FBA Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve seller launch readiness, stock predictability, and fulfillment attach on strategic assortments.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase growth through fewer suppressed launches and fewer stock-driven losses.
Increase Prime-eligible coverage where it improves service and conversion.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase service attach and seller retention.

productBricks.change: Improve launch-readiness requirements and content completeness guidance.
Improve stockout prediction and replenishment recommendations.
Improve inbound planning and network-capacity visibility.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated Seller Central launch and FBA workflows.

items.title: Retail Media Measurement Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve advertiser outcome confidence through retail-aware campaign controls and clearer measurement workflows.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the efficiency of strategic advertiser investment.
Increase confidence in media and commerce decision making.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase advertiser retention and budget depth.

productBricks.change: Improve campaign controls tied to retail readiness.
Improve seller and advertiser reporting alignment.
Improve measured spend and incrementality workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated Amazon Ads optimization and reporting surfaces.
Release improved measurement outputs for enterprise workflows.
